case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP VS. ALFREDO ROSARIO ANGELES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANGELES, ALFREDO ROSARIO $2,380.30 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,480.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,380.30 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP AS TO DEFENDANT ANGELES, ALFREDO ROSARIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-30-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
